content:
RORK FINAL AUDIT + DEPLOY — FIX 16 FAILED FEATURES

Repo:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

Current evidence:
Production is stale on be86b652.
GitHub has newer code.
16/20 features fail with 404.
Commit match = NO.

MISSION:
Deploy latest code to production and verify all 20 features.

NO narrative.
NO placeholders.
NO fake verified.

STEP 1 — Fix deployment gap
- Trigger GitHub → Render deploy
- If auto-deploy fails, use deploy hook
- If deploy hook fails, return exact error
- Wait until production SHA changes

STEP 2 — Commit match
Return:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_SHA:
HEALTH_SHA:
VERSION_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:

STEP 3 — Fix all 404 routes
For each failed feature:
- Locate route
- Confirm backend registration
- Confirm production build includes route
- Fix missing API
- Redeploy
- Retest

Failed features to fix:
1 Featured Properties
2 Property Details
3 Member Registration
4 Email Verification
5 SMS Verification
6 Members Dashboard
7 Investor Dashboard
8 CRM
9 JV Deals
10 Property Admin
11 Media Upload
12 Instagram Cards
13 Likes
14 Comments
15 Shares
16 Saves
17 Analytics

STEP 4 — Verify 20 features
Return each as:
FEATURE:
URL/API:
HTTP_STATUS:
RAW_RESPONSE:
STATUS:

STEP 5 — Final output only

GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_SHA:
HEALTH_SHA:
VERSION_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:
FEATURES_VERIFIED:
FEATURES_FAILED:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

FINAL_STATUS = VERIFIED only if:
GitHub SHA = Render SHA = Health SHA = Version SHA
and all 20 features pass production tests.

If blocked, return the single exact blocker.
